zh.lifeSummary: 當Magnus I Olafssen den gode於1024年出生在挪威奧斯陸時，他的父親Olaf II Haraldsen of Norway Heilag olof30歲，母親Astrid Olofsdotter25歲。他和Wife Magnus I Olafsson至少有1個女兒。他於1035年在挪威被列為king。他去世於1047年10月25日在丹麥亞藍德享年23歲，埋葬在挪威奧-特洛德拉格特洛德海姆尼達洛斯 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.Stiklestad, Verdal, Nord-Trøndelag, Norw: 挪威諾爾-特洛德拉格維爾達爾 普雷斯特爾德斯可萊斯塔德

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magnus I Olafssen den gode于1024年出生在挪威奧斯陸时，他的父亲Olaf II Haraldsen of Norway Heilag olof30岁，母亲Astrid Olofsdotter25岁。他和Wife Magnus I Olafsson至少有1个女儿。他于1035年在挪威被列为king。他去世于1047年10月25日在丹麦亞藍德享年23岁，埋葬在挪威奧-特洛德拉格特洛德海姆尼達洛斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Olafssen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Olaf, from Old Norse Óláfr, Ólafr, variant Óleifr, earlier Anleifr, from proto-Scandinavian elements meaning ‘ancestor’ + ‘heir, descendant’. Olaf (also Olav, in Sweden Olof) has always been one of the most common Scandinavian names; it continued to be popular in the Middle Ages, in part as a result of the fame of Saint Olaf, King of Norway, who brought Christianity to his country c. 1030. This surname is rare in Denmark. Compare Olafson .

variants.name: Olsen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels, Nils, Lars, Alf, Thor, Niels, Sven, Jorgen, Helmer, Iver, Arnfinn.

Danish and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name Ole, a short form of Olaf, Olav (see Olafsen ). This surname is the third most common in Norway. It is also established in northeastern England and in northern Germany. Compare Ohlsen , Olesen , Oleson , and Olson .
German (Ölsen): habitational name from any of several places so named, in Saxony, Brandenburg, and the Rhineland.

variants.name: Olsson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lars, Lennart, Sven, Nils, Erik, Mats, Per, Anders, Bjorn, Fredrik, Nels, Olle.  German Hans, Kurt, Fritz, Ingeborg, Otto, Ute.

Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Ola, a short form of Olof, Swedish variant of Olaf (see Olafsen ), or a shortened form of the patronymic Olofsson (see Olofson ). Compare Ohlsson , Oleson , and Olson .
German (Eastphalia): patronymic from a short form of the personal name   Ulrich  .

variants.name: Olofson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Berger, Iver.
Americanized form (and a rare Swedish variant) of Swedish Olofsson: patronymic from the personal name Olof, Swedish variant of Olaf (see Olafsen ). See also Olsson .

variants.name: Olafson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Olafsen or of its very rare Swedish cognate Olafsson.

nameMeanings.name: Magnus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Latin byname meaning ‘great’, this was first extracted from the name of Charlemagne (recorded in Latin chronicles as Carolus Magnus ‘Charles the Great’) and used as a given name by the Scandinavians. It was borne by seven medieval kings of Norway, including Magnus I ( 1024–47 ), known as Magnus the Good, and Magnus VI ( 1238–80 ), known as Magnus the Law Mender. There are several early Scandinavian saints called Magnus, including an earl of Orkney ( d. 1116 ), to whom Kirkwall cathedral is dedicated. The name was imported to Scotland and Ireland during the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: King Canute is declared ruler of Denmark, England and Norway.

en.lifeSummary: When Magnus I Olafssen den gode was born in 1024, in Oslo, Norway, his father, Olaf II Haraldsen of Norway Heilag olof, was 30 and his mother, Astrid Olofsdotter, was 25. He had at least 1 daughter with Wife Magnus I Olafsson. In 1035, at the age of 11, his occupation is listed as king in Norway. He died on 25 October 1047, in Sjælland, Denmark, at the age of 23, and was buried in Nidaros Cathedral, Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norway.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magnus I Olafssen den gode est né en 1024, à Oslo, Norvège, son père, Olaf II Haraldsen of Norway Heilag olof, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Astrid Olofsdotter, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Wife Magnus I Olafsson. En 1035, à l’âge de 11 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est king à Norvège. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1047, à Sjælland, Danemark, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterré à Nidaros Cathedral, Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norvège.

de.lifeSummary: Als Magnus I Olafssen den gode 1024 in Oslo, Norwegen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Olaf II Haraldsen of Norway Heilag olof 30 und seine Mutter Astrid Olofsdotter 25. Er hatte mit Wife Magnus I Olafsson mindestens 1 Tochter. 1035, als er 11 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als king in Norwegen aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1047 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Sjælland, Dänemark und wurde in Nidaros Cathedral, Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norwegen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magnus I Olafssen den gode è nato il nel 1024 nel Oslo, Norvegia, il suo padre, Olaf II Haraldsen of Norway Heilag olof, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Astrid Olofsdotter, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Wife Magnus I Olafsson. Nel 1035, all'età di 11 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come king nel Norvegia. Morì il 25 ottobre 1047, nel Sjælland, Danimarca, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolto a Nidaros Cathedral, Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Norvegia.

ja.lifeSummary: Magnus I Olafssen den godeが1024年にノルウェーオスロで生まれた時，父Olaf II Haraldsen of Norway Heilag olofは30歳，母Astrid Olofsdotterは25歳であった。彼はWife Magnus I Olafssonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。1035年，11歳の時，ノルウェーでの職業はkingと記録されている。彼は1047年10月25日にデンマークスジaeランドで23歳で死去し，ノルウェースoル-トルoンデラグトロンドヘイムニダロス カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Magnus I Olafssen den gode(이)가 1024년 노르웨이 오슬로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Olaf II Haraldsen of Norway Heilag olof(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Astrid Olofsdotter(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Wife Magnus I Olafsson(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1035년, 11세의 나이로 그의 직업은 노르웨이에서 king이었다. 그는 1047년 10월 25일 덴마크 스jae랜드에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 노르웨이 스o-트o들라그 트론드하임 나이더로스 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.Between 8 June 1042 and 25 October 1047: de 8 de junho de 1042 a 25 de outubro de 1047
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magnus I Olafssen den gode nasceu em 1024, em Oslo, Noruega, seu pai, Olaf II Haraldsen of Norway Heilag olof, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Astrid Olofsdotter, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Wife Magnus I Olafsson. Em 1035, com 11 anos, sua profissão aparece como king em Noruega. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1047, em Sjælland, Dinamarca, com 23 anos, e foi sepultado em Nidaros Cathedral, Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Noruega.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magnus I Olafssen den gode родился в 1024 г. в местности ослоу, Норвегия, его отцу по имени Olaf II Haraldsen of Norway Heilag olof было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Astrid Olofsdotter, 25. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Wife Magnus I Olafsson. В 1035 году, в возрасте 11 год,  он работал по профессии king в местности Норвегия. Он умер 25 октября 1047 г. в местности сджaeлланд, Дания в возрасте 23 лет и был похоронен в местности нидарос кэтедраль, трондхим, сoр-трoнделаг, Норвегия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Magnus I Olafssen den gode nació en 1024, en Oslo, Noruega, su papá, Olaf II Haraldsen of Norway Heilag olof, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Astrid Olofsdotter, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Wife Magnus I Olafsson. En 1035, a la edad de 11 años, su ocupación registrada era king en Noruega. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1047, en Sjælland, Dinamarca, a la edad de 23 años, y fue sepultado en Nidaros Cathedral, Trondheim, Sør-Trøndelag, Noruega.
